entry.title: New IDC HSTS0516DSPP906 awarded to COVENANT AVIATION SECURITY, LLC for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: IGF::CL,CT::IGF CONTRACT HSTS05-16-D-SPP906. THIS IDIQ CONTRACT IS ISSUED FOR SECURITY SCREENING SERVICES AT AIRPORTS NATIONWIDE, UNDER THE TRANSPORTATION SECURITY ADMINISTRATION'S (TSA) SCREENING PARTNERSHIP PROGRAM (SPP). SERVICES INCLUDE COMPREHENSIVE SCREENING OF PASSENGERS AND BAGGAGE AT AIRPORTS PARTICIPATING IN THE SPP.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

entry.title: IDC HSTS0516DSPP906 (P00001) awarded to COVENANT AVIATION SECURITY LLC, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: IGF::CL,CT::IGF THE PURPOSE OF MODIFICATION P00001 TO IDIQ CONTRACT #HSTS05-16-D-SPP906 IS TO UPDATE NUMEROUS SECTIONS OF THE CONTRACT TO ALIGN WITH CURRENT PROGRAM REQUIREMENTS.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

entry.title: IDC HSTS0516DSPP906 (P00002) awarded to COVENANT AVIATION SECURITY LLC, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: IGF::CL,CT::IGF THIS MODIFICATION IS BEING ISSUED FOR ALL SPP CONTRACTS AND TASK ORDERS TO REVISE THE REQUIREMENT REGARDING OFFICER HAND PROTECTION DURING CONTRACT PERFORMANCE. THIS MODIFICATION CHANGES SECTION C.4.11 "SAFETY&HEALTH" REQUIREMENTS. NO FUNDS ARE BEING OBLIGATED WITH THIS MODIFICATION.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)
